title: Restriction Digest
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"acoh3","text":"This protocol includes three different methods of digestion.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add the following reagents to a tube. %s %s Total 10ul 30ul 50ul DNA 0.4ug 1.2ug 2ug Enzyme 0.2ul 0.6ul 1ul Buffer(10*) 1ul 3ul 5ul ddwater Fill the rest with water
Put at 37℃ for about 2 hours (according to different enzymes).
Add the following reagents to a tube. %s %s Total 10ul 30ul 50ul DNA 0.4ug 1.2ug 2ug Enzyme 0.2ul 0.6ul 1ul Buffer(10*) 1ul 3ul 5ul ddwater Fill the rest with water
Put at 37℃ for about 2 hours (according to different enzymes).
Put at 65℃ for about 20 min.(according to different enzymes)
Purification of enzyme digestion products with Cycle Pure Kit D6492（OMEGA bio-tek）
DNA product concentrations were measured using Nano
Add the following reagents to a tube: %s %s Total 10ul 30ul 50ul DNA product 0.4ug 1.2ug 2ug CIP(NEB) 0.2ul 0.6ul 1ul Cutsmart(10*) 1ul 3ul 5ul ddwater Fill the rest with water
Put at 37℃ for about 2 hours (according to different enzymes).
Add the following reagents to a tube. %s %s Total 10ul 30ul 50ul DNA 0.4ug 1.2ug 2ug Enzyme 1 0.2ul 0.6ul 1ul Enzyme 2 0.2ul 0.6ul 1ul Buffer(10*) 1ul 3ul 5ul ddwater Fill the rest with water
Put at 37℃ for about 2 hours (according to different enzymes).
Add the following reagents to a tube. %s %s Total 10ul 30ul 50ul DNA product 0.4ug 1.2ug 2ug DpnI(NEB) 0.2ul 0.6ul 1ul Cutsmart(10*) 1ul 3ul 5ul ddwater Fill the rest with water
Put at 37℃ for about 2 hours (according to different enzymes).
